column2: An organization wants its email service hosted outside its local data center and managed as an online productivity service. Which type of system should be configured?
column5:
Why

The mail service resides in the cloud instead of on an email server maintained in the organization's local data center. Product names can vary, but that service-location distinction is stable.
column9: CompTIA 220-1202 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 1.11; Professor Messer 220-1202 v1.40, p. 23
column10: A+::220-1202::1.11 A+::220-1202::Domain1-OperatingSystems A+::220-1202::CloudBasedProductivityTools Basic HighYield CloudProductivity Email Scenario Source::Messer-v140

column2: A user saves a document on a laptop and needs the updated file to become available automatically on the user's other registered devices. Which cloud storage feature should be configured?
column5:
Why

Synchronization uploads the local change to cloud storage and makes it available to the other synchronized devices. Folder settings determine which content participates and whether it remains stored locally.
column9: CompTIA 220-1202 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 1.11; Professor Messer 220-1202 v1.40, p. 23
column10: A+::220-1202::1.11 A+::220-1202::Domain1-OperatingSystems A+::220-1202::CloudBasedProductivityTools Basic HighYield CloudProductivity Storage Synchronization Scenario Source::Messer-v140

column2: A laptop has limited local storage. The user needs one project folder available offline, while older cloud files can remain available on demand. What should the technician configure?
column4: Configure the cloud storage folder settings so the project folder is stored locally and the older content uses streaming or on-demand access.
column5:
Why

Folder settings control which content consumes local space. The offline requirement identifies what must remain local; the remaining content can stay cloud-backed until accessed.
column9: CompTIA 220-1202 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 1.11; Professor Messer 220-1202 v1.40, p. 23
column10: A+::220-1202::1.11 A+::220-1202::Domain1-OperatingSystems A+::220-1202::CloudBasedProductivityTools Basic HighYield CloudProductivity Storage FolderSettings Scenario Source::Messer-v140

column2: Several remote employees need to update the same table of budget values and formulas. Which cloud collaboration tool best matches the task?
column5:
Why

Rows, columns, formulas, and shared numerical data point to a spreadsheet. A word processor is better suited to a primarily narrative document.
column9: CompTIA 220-1202 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 1.11; Professor Messer 220-1202 v1.40, p. 23
column10: A+::220-1202::1.11 A+::220-1202::Domain1-OperatingSystems A+::220-1202::CloudBasedProductivityTools Basic CloudProductivity Collaboration Spreadsheets Scenario Source::Messer-v140

column2: A distributed team needs a scheduled live meeting in which remote participants can see and hear one another. Which cloud collaboration tool should be used?
column5:
Exam Trap

Instant messaging supports quick text exchanges, but the requirement for a live audio-and-video meeting identifies videoconferencing.
column9: CompTIA 220-1202 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 1.11; Professor Messer 220-1202 v1.40, p. 23
column10: A+::220-1202::1.11 A+::220-1202::Domain1-OperatingSystems A+::220-1202::CloudBasedProductivityTools Basic CloudProductivity Collaboration Videoconferencing Scenario Source::Messer-v140

column2: A sales team needs to coauthor a sequence of visual slides for a customer briefing. Which cloud collaboration tool best fits this work?
column5:
Why

The required output is a slide-based briefing. Videoconferencing may deliver the briefing remotely, but it does not replace the tool used to create the slides.
column9: CompTIA 220-1202 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 1.11; Professor Messer 220-1202 v1.40, p. 23
column10: A+::220-1202::1.11 A+::220-1202::Domain1-OperatingSystems A+::220-1202::CloudBasedProductivityTools Basic CloudProductivity Collaboration Presentations Scenario Source::Messer-v140

column2: Two employees need to draft and revise the same text-focused policy document from different locations. Which cloud collaboration tool best matches the task?
column5:
Why

The output is a narrative document, which makes word processing the appropriate category. A spreadsheet is intended for structured rows, columns, and calculations.
column9: CompTIA 220-1202 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 1.11; Professor Messer 220-1202 v1.40, p. 23
column10: A+::220-1202::1.11 A+::220-1202::Domain1-OperatingSystems A+::220-1202::CloudBasedProductivityTools Basic CloudProductivity Collaboration WordProcessing Scenario Source::Messer-v140

column2: Remote support staff need quick text conversations and short status updates without scheduling a meeting. Which cloud collaboration tool best fits the need?
column5:
Exam Trap

Use videoconferencing when the scenario requires a live audio-and-video session. Short, near-real-time text exchanges point to instant messaging.
column9: CompTIA 220-1202 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 1.11; Professor Messer 220-1202 v1.40, p. 23
column10: A+::220-1202::1.11 A+::220-1202::Domain1-OperatingSystems A+::220-1202::CloudBasedProductivityTools Basic CloudProductivity Collaboration InstantMessaging Scenario Source::Messer-v140

column2: An administrator creates a new employee in the organization's managed directory. The account must then appear automatically in connected cloud directories. What should be configured?
column5:
Why

Identity synchronization propagates directory changes to connected identity systems. It reduces duplicate account maintenance, but it does not automatically grant every licensed application.
column9: CompTIA 220-1202 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 1.11; Professor Messer 220-1202 v1.40, p. 23
column10: A+::220-1202::1.11 A+::220-1202::Domain1-OperatingSystems A+::220-1202::CloudBasedProductivityTools Basic HighYield CloudProductivity Identity Synchronization Scenario Source::Messer-v140

column2: A new employee's synchronized cloud identity exists, but the employee cannot use a subscription productivity application. What configuration should the administrator verify next?
column4: Verify that the required cloud application license is assigned to the user.
column5:
Exam Trap

Identity synchronization creates or updates the cloud account; license assignment grants the user's entitlement to the subscription application. One can succeed while the other is still missing.
column9: CompTIA 220-1202 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 1.11; Professor Messer 220-1202 v1.40, p. 23
column10: A+::220-1202::1.11 A+::220-1202::Domain1-OperatingSystems A+::220-1202::CloudBasedProductivityTools Basic HighYield CloudProductivity Licensing Identity Scenario Source::Messer-v140
